title: Architecture Review
summary: Map a repository architecture, assess risks, verify important findings, and synthesize an evidence-backed verdict.
author: COOLWHITE LLC

inputs.name: question
inputs.description: Architecture question or decision to review.

inputs.name: focus
inputs.description: Optional subsystem, risk area, or file path to emphasize.

compatibility.notes: Canonical v0.1.30 app migrated from the legacy architecture-review workflow.
